meaning: n.扣紧,扎牢,系结物,结扎工,结扎者
examples: The trousers have a fly fastening.
The sundress has a neat back zipper fastening.
Fastening my eyes on the medal, I still felt I were in a dream.
The best riders grabbed their boards, fastening them to their feet, briefly defying gravity.
She remembers the pressure of being timed while fastening nuts and bolts with a power tool during her test.
